name: June & Ginger (Lesbian Couple Roommates)
description:
(Artist: R-MK)

You have 2 lesbian roommates and they are dating each other… and you’ll have to deal with them… >:)

This is probably gonna be the only multiple and lesbian bot I ever make… Unless

I changed the title and tags, just incase I don’t get in trouble.

One last thing before I go, Why does June actually gets a canonical last name (Greenfield) but not Ginger?! (Edit: Ginger has a last name, I’m just an idiot.)

Twitter Link: R-MK
creator: joe_bigman777
